---
title: "Publications"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

:::{.year-row}
:::{.year}
2023
:::
:::{.stack}
:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Housing supply in the presence of informality", joint with Ricardo Guedes and [Marcelo Sant'Anna](https://marcelosantanna.wordpress.com).

*Regional Science and Urban Economics*, 99 (2023), 103875.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/Housing_Supply_in_the_Presence_of_Informality.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.regsciurbeco.2023.103875)
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::{.year-row}
:::{.year}
2022
:::
:::{.stack}
:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Underdiversification and idiosyncratic risk externalities", joint with [Dejanir Silva](https://sites.google.com/site/dejanirhsilva/) and [Chao Zi](https://czi.finance).

*Journal of Financial Economics*, 143(3) (2022), 1227-1250.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/IdRiskExternalities.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jfineco.2021.05.001)
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::{.year-row}
:::{.year}
2021
:::
:::{.stack}
:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Information quality and regime change: Evidence from the lab", joint with [Leif Helland](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=roOrocAAAAAJ&hl=no), [Ragnar Juelsrud](https://www.norges-bank.no/en/topics/Research/economists/juelsrud-ragnar/), and [Plamen T. Nenov](https://sites.google.com/site/ptnenov/).

*Journal of Economic Behavior and Organization*, 191 (2021), 538-554.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/globalgamesexperiments.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jebo.2021.08.036)
:::
:::

:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"The choice channel of financial innovation", joint with [Plamen Nenov](https://sites.google.com/site/ptnenov/) and [Alp Simsek](https://sites.google.com/view/alpsimsek/home).

*American Economic Journal: Macroeconomics*, 13(2) (2021), 333-72.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/financialInnovationSaving_AEJ_unformatted_SciWord.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1257/mac.20180429)
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::{.year-row}
:::{.year}
2020
:::
:::{.stack}
:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Labor earnings dynamics in a developing economy with a large informal sector", joint with [Diego Gomes](https://scholar.google.com.br/citations?user=rdZgUZwAAAAJ&hl=pt-BR) and [Cézar Santos](https://sites.google.com/site/czrsantos/).

*Journal of Economic Dynamics and Control*, 113 (2020), 103854.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/EarningsInformality.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jedc.2020.103854)
:::
:::

:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Competitive real options under private information", joint with [Leandro Gorno](https://sites.google.com/site/leandrogorno/).

*Journal of Economic Theory*, 185 (2020), 104945.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/CompRealOptions.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jet.2019.104945)
:::
:::

:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Capital budgeting and risk taking under credit constraints".

*Management Science*, 66(9) (2020), 4292-4314.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/CapBudCredConst.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2019.3369)
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::{.year-row}
:::{.year}
2018
:::
:::{.stack}
:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Homicides and the age of criminal responsibility in Brazil: a regression discontinuity approach", joint with [F. Costa](https://sites.google.com/site/fjmcosta/), J. Faria, and B. Caballero.

*Economía, the Journal of LACEA*, 19(1) (2018), 59-92.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/CCFI_2018Mar_final.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1353/eco.2018.0008)
:::
:::
:::
:::

:::{.year-row}
:::{.year}
2015
:::
:::{.stack}
:::{.pub}
:::{.pub-body}
"Information quality and crises in regime-change games", joint with [Plamen Nenov](https://sites.google.com/site/ptnenov/).

*Journal of Economic Theory*, 158 (2015), 739-768.
:::
:::{.actions}
[pdf ↓](papers/InfoQualRegChang.pdf)
[journal ↗](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jet.2014.03.005)
:::
:::
:::
:::
